overview: Seshadri Rao Gudlavalleru Engineering College (formerly Gudlavalleru Engineering College), located in Seshadri Rao Knowledge Village, Gudlavalleru, Krishna District, Andhra Pradesh, is a premier self-financing private engineering institution established in 1998. Promoted by the Adusumilli Aswardha Narayana Murthy & Vallurupalli Venkata Rama Seshadri Rao Educational Society, the college is widely recognized for its robust technical training programs, extensive infrastructure, and industry-aligned training curriculum aimed at enhancing rural and technical education.
accreditation: Approved by AICTE, permanently affiliated to JNTUK Kakinada. Accredited by NAAC with 'A' Grade and its flagship B.Tech undergraduate programs are accredited by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA).

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech Premium Computing Specializations (CSE, AI&DS, AI&ML)
B.Tech Mid-Tier Engineering Streams (Information Technology, ECE)
B.Tech Core Engineering Programs (Civil, Mechanical, EEE, IoT)

placements.placementRate: Engineering Streams: 60% – 80% based on eligibility criteria
placements.totalOffers: 951+ job offers recorded during the 2025 recruitment drive
placements.companiesVisited: Amazon, Capgemini, Cognizant, Infosys, Accenture, TCS, Wipro, Zithara Technologies
placements.internshipHighlights: Pre-placement corporate training sessions and active career counseling integrated into the curriculum.

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are majorly processed through the Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE) counseling based on rank secured in state-level entrance tests (AP EAPCET/ICET) or via management quota allocations.
admissions.importantDates: Schedules align directly with APSCHE admission notifications, AP EAPCET counseling, and national-level test results.

campus.specialNote: Canteen meals are available separately, or integrated packages can be availed directly via the campus management guidelines.

hostelFees.StandardBoysHostel: ₹42,000 – ₹60,000 per year including basic mess utilities
hostelFees.StandardGirlsHostel: ₹42,000 – ₹60,000 per year including basic mess utilities

contact.address: Seshadri Rao Gudlavalleru Engineering College, Seshadri Rao Knowledge Village, Gudlavalleru, Krishna District, Andhra Pradesh – 521356, India

scholarships.meritScholarships: Tuition fee concessions available for top-performing institutional students.
scholarships.fullWaiver: 100% tuition coverage for students qualifying under government merit-free category allocations.
scholarships.partialWaiver: Internal fee concessions are allocated to meritorious and financially strained candidates by the management board.
scholarships.governmentAid: Eligible candidates from SC/ST/OBC/EWS socio-economic backgrounds can fully avail the Andhra Pradesh Jagananna Amma Vodi and Vidya Deevena fee reimbursement schemes.
